title: jason's spicy vannila+
description: Jason’s Spicy Vanilla+ — Vanilla Minecraft with boosted performance, upgraded visuals, and handy QoL mods for a spicier experience.
body:
# Jason’s Spicy Vanilla+

**Jason’s Spicy Vanilla+** is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack that enhances the vanilla experience with strategic performance, visual, and quality-of-life enhancements—keeping the game familiar, efficient, and just a bit spicier.

## Core Features
- **Performance Boosts:** *Sodium*, *Lithium*, *FerriteCore*, and *ImmediatelyFast* maximize FPS and reduce lag.
- **Visual Enhancements:** *Iris Shaders*, *Distant Horizons*, *BetterGrassify*, and *Continuity* elevate terrain detail and lighting.
- **Better Gameplay:** *Tom’s Simple Storage*,and *Inventory Profiles Next* simplify inventory management.
- **Multiplayer Compatibility:** Designed for multiplayer—some mods require installation on both client and server for full functionality.

##  Notable Mods Overview

### Tom’s Simple Storage  

A simple, vanilla-style storage mod offering storage & crafting terminals, wireless terminals, inventory connectors, and more for seamless inventory management.  
Supports both Fabric and Forge and is compatible with client and server setups.

### Distant Horizons  

Implements a Level-of-Detail (LOD) system to render simplified chunks beyond the usual view distance—boosting draw distances while preserving performance. It works client-only, but installing on both client and server improves LOD syncing in multiplayer.

## Basic Mod List & Multiplayer Compatibility

| Mod | Purpose | Multiplayer Notes |
|-----|---------|-------------------|
| **Sodium** | Rendering optimization for smoother performance | Client-only |
| **Lithium** | Optimizes game logic for both client and server | Client & Server |
| **FerriteCore** | Reduces RAM usage for models/entities | Client & Server |
| **Iris Shaders** | Enables shaders with high-quality effects | Client-only |
| **Distant Horizons** | Extended render distance via LOD | Works client-only, better sync if on server too |
| **Tom’s Simple Storage** | Advanced storage network (wireless, terminal, connector, etc.) | Must be installed on both client & server |
| **Inventory Profiles Next** | Inventory management & sorting UI | Client-only |
| **No Chat Reports** | Disables Microsoft chat reporting | Client-only |
| **BetterGrassify** | Enhances grass block rendering | Client-only |
| **Continuity** | Connected textures & improved visuals | Client-only |
| **Dynamic FPS** | Reduces FPS when game is unfocused | Client-only |
| **Sound Physics Remastered** | Realistic environmental sound propagation | Client-only |
